info.title: Beampipe
info.description:
Beampipe Core

## Getting started

1. **Authenticate** — `POST /api/v1/login` with the admin email and password you set during setup. Copy the returned `access_token` and click **Authorize** at the top of this page (Bearer token).
2. **Browse sources** — `GET /api/v1/sources` lists everything in the registry.
3. **Run discovery** — `POST /api/v1/sources/discover` to enqueue a discovery run.

Health: `GET /api/v1/health` (liveness) · `GET /api/v1/ready` (deps).

Local-only UI: [`/sources`](/sources) for a minimal browser view.

post.description:
Create a new background task.

Parameters
----------
message: str
    The message or data to be processed by the task.

Returns
-------
dict[str, str]
    A dictionary containing the ID of the created task.

get.description:
Get information about a specific background task.

Parameters
----------
task_id: str
    The ID of the task.

Returns
-------
Optional[dict[str, Any]]
    A dictionary containing information about the task if found, or None otherwise.

Response Execute Execution Api V1 Executions  Execution Id  Execute Post

BatchExecutionRecordUpdate.title: BatchExecutionRecordUpdate
BatchExecutionRecordUpdate.description:
Schema for updating execution records via API.

Note: status, started_at, and completed_at are managed automatically
by the service layer based on status transitions.

duration_seconds.title: Duration Seconds
duration_seconds.description: completed_at - started_at when both are present (rounded ms precision).

source_identifiers.title: Source Identifiers
source_identifiers.description: List of sources to mark. Omit to all enabled sources for the project.

marked_count.title: Marked Count
marked_count.description: Number of sources marked for recheck

message.title: Message
message.default: Sources marked for rediscovery. Discovery runs asynchronously via the background scheduler.

do_stage.title: Do Stage
do_stage.description: Stage data from the archive before execution

do_submit.title: Do Submit
do_submit.description: Submit the graph to DALiuGE after staging

ExecutionPhase.title: ExecutionPhase
ExecutionPhase.description:
STAGE_AND_MANIFEST: staging (if enabled) and manifest build not yet persisted.
SUBMIT: workflow_manifest is on the row; remainder is graph resolve + TM/DIM (or slurm).

sbids.title: Sbids
sbids.description: Optional: restrict to these SBIDs for this source. Omit to include all.

ExecutionSourceSpec.title: ExecutionSourceSpec
ExecutionSourceSpec.description: Per-source spec with optional SBID filter.

PrepareExecutionResponse.title: PrepareExecutionResponse
PrepareExecutionResponse.description: Preview of what would be included in an execution.

exports.title: Exports
exports.description: Known module exports relevant to discovery integration

enrichment_keys.title: Enrichment Keys
enrichment_keys.description: Discover bundle enrichment keys this module uses (e.g. ra_dec_vsys, sbid_to_eval_file)

graph_path.title: Graph Path
graph_path.description: Local path to .graph file if set

graph_github_url.title: Graph Github Url
graph_github_url.description: GitHub raw URL to graph if set

workflow_execution_automation.title: Workflow Execution Automation
workflow_execution_automation.description: Module WORKFLOW_EXECUTION_AUTOMATION dict when present (workflow auto-scheduling policy)

workflow_discovery_automation.title: Workflow Discovery Automation
workflow_discovery_automation.description: Module WORKFLOW_DISCOVERY_AUTOMATION dict when present (discovery auto-scheduling policy)

dim_host_for_tm.title: Dim Host For Tm
dim_host_for_tm.description: DIM host as seen by translator (gen_pg)

ssh_port.title: Ssh Port
ssh_port.description: SSH port on the login node.

exec_prefix.title: Exec Prefix
exec_prefix.description: FACILITY EXEC_PREFIX used in generated jobsub command prefix.

venv.title: Venv
venv.description: Shell snippet to source before invoking(e.g. 'source /software/projects/<acc>/venv/bin/activate').

modules.title: Modules

verify_ssl.title: Verify Ssl
verify_ssl.description: TLS verification used by TM translation HTTP calls.

SlurmRemoteDeploymentConfig.title: SlurmRemoteDeploymentConfig
SlurmRemoteDeploymentConfig.description:
DALiuGE remote SLURM deployment (generated INI + SSH submit).

At submit time Beampipe stages a generated DALiuGE ``--config_file`` INI on
the login node and calls ``python3 -m dlg.deploy.create_dlg_job`` over SSH.
Profile fields therefore capture both transport/auth details and the
INI-style facility/engine controls used by DALiuGE.

SourceLinkedExecutionItem.title: SourceLinkedExecutionItem
SourceLinkedExecutionItem.description: One batch execution that included this registry source.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: monitoring is enabled for this source?

last_attempted_at.title: Last Attempted At
last_attempted_at.description: Last failed discovery attempt timestamp (retry cooldown anchor).

stale_after_hours.title: Stale After Hours
stale_after_hours.description: Recheck after this many hours; null = use default (DISCOVERY_STALE_HOURS)

discovery_signature.title: Discovery Signature
discovery_signature.description: Hash of last discovery state; used to skip writes when unchanged.

discovery_claim_expires_at.title: Discovery Claim Expires At
discovery_claim_expires_at.description: When the current discovery lease expires; null means no active lease.

workflow_run_pending.title: Workflow Run Pending
workflow_run_pending.description: True when source has newly discovered metadata awaiting orchestration.

workflow_run_pending_at.title: Workflow Run Pending At
workflow_run_pending_at.description: Timestamp when source was marked pending for workflow execution.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: monitoring is enabled for this source?

stale_after_hours.title: Stale After Hours
stale_after_hours.description: Recheck after this many hours; null = use default. Omit to leave unchanged.
